MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 8-item sensation-seeking scale; items rated 1 (Strongly Disagree) to 5 (Strongly Agree).

bss_1.Description: I would like to explore strange places.

bss_2.Description: I get restless when I spend too much time at home.

bss_4.Description: I like to do frightening things.

bss_5.Description: I would like to take off on a trip with no preplanned routes or timetables.

bss_6.Description: I would like to have new and exciting experiences, even if they

bss_7.Description: I prefer friends who are excitingly unpredictable.

bss_8.Description: I would like to try bungee jumping.

bss_score_mean.Description: BSS overall mean of items bss_1-bss_8.

bss_score_experience.Description: Experience Seeking subscale: mean of bss_1, bss_5.

bss_score_boredom.Description: Boredom Susceptibility subscale: mean of bss_2, bss_6.

bss_score_thrill.Description: Thrill & Adventure Seeking subscale: mean of bss_3, bss_7.

bss_score_disinhibition.Description: Disinhibition subscale: mean of bss_4, bss_8.
